items.claim: Tyrell Fortune can be taken down and is a good offensive wrestler with good hands.
items.quote: Tyrell can be taken down. He's a good offensive wrestler and he's got good hands.

items.claim: Mike Davis and Nurullo Aliev have relatively even striking.
items.quote: I think the striking is probably relatively even.

items.claim: Mike Davis has an advantage in jiu-jitsu over Nurullo Aliev.
items.quote: The jiu-jitsu is going to lean towards Mike Davis.

items.claim: Nurullo Aliev holds the wrestling advantage over Mike Davis.
items.quote: The wrestling, in my opinion, will lean towards Nurullo

items.claim: Steve Erceg's chin is starting to go.
Steve Erceg earned his title shot by knocking out Matt Schnell.
items.quote: First of all, he earned a title shot by knocking out the most knock-out-able fighter on the UFC roster. Oh, you knocked out Matt Schnell?

items.claim: Ramazan Temirov has good pressure and strong takedown defense.
items.quote: I think his pressure is good. I think the takedown defense is there.
